title: Me to You Tatty Teddy Plush 10cm-High Big Hugs Bear With Padded Faux Fur Hearts - Official Collection, Grey
features: ADORABLE PLUSH TATTY TEDDY - send love and support to a special friend or family member with this cute Tatty Teddy holding two padded hearts; this is a lovely gift for all kinds of occasions such as birthday, thinking of you, get well soon, sympathy or just because
SOFT FABRIC AND EMBROIDERED DETAIL - Tatty Teddy's grey fur is super soft and fluffy; the padded red and pink hearts are made from luxurious faux fur and embroidered in gold with the words 'Big Hugs'

BEAR SITS 10CM HIGH - suitable for children over 3 as well as teenagers or adults, this sweet little bear is just the right size to display on a shelf, desk or bedside table - or pop Tatty Teddy into a bag ready for a comforting cuddle whenever you need one!
HAND FINISHED FOR PREMIUM QUALITY - every Tatty Teddy plush bear is made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail to be treasured for a lifetime

GENUINE TATTY TEDDY by ME TO YOU – unique and instantly recognisable with grey fur, a cute blue nose and patches, Tatty Teddy has captured millions of hearts all over the world with a timeless message of love, happiness and friendship
description: Product Description Send love and hugs to someone special with this adorable Tatty Teddy from the latest Me to You plush collection. This beautifully soft and fluffy plush bear sits just 10cm high and would make a perfect gift for a special friend or a family member such as a son, daughter, grandson, granddaughter, niece or nephew. The red and pink padded hearts are made from luxurious faux fur and embroidered with the words 'Big Hugs' in gold. This sweet Tatty Teddy is small enough to pack in a bag or case, so you can have a comforting cuddle with your favourite blue-nose bear whenever you need one! Made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail, all Me to You plush bears are hand finished for premium quality to be treasured forever. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
